_meta.schema: v4 (S41.1) — sessions[] per round; distance NOT stored (engine computes km from tracks.json). GP sprint(laps)+main(hours-as-laps) split; endurance hours→km via avg_speed_kmh; double race = 2 race-sessions. Fixes: T090→T092, T113→T084.
